events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: tool/material selection for motor circuits & disconnects commercial project. Staged, parts clean intact sized per referenced sheet, NEC Art 430 on hand. Task choose correct tool/material/method. The described field condition: selected package matches size rating application. Staged parts clean intact sized. So decision pass. Need fill fields. Risk low. Work_stage staged. Component_conditions empty. Percent_complete maybe 0 since staged not begun. Value 0. Confidence high e.g. 0.95. Sound_source empty string? Schema string. event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, order empty list, workable empty list (unless list activity IDs). Findings empty. Actions maybe none. Rationale: materials/tools/disconnects match motor circuit requirements and NEC Art 430 ratings; staged components clean intact. References NEC Art 430. Need ensure valid JSON. No prose outside.
